query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, sr.code as role_code, sr.name as role_name, usr.isActive
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN userSystemRoles usr ON u.id = usr.userId 
LEFT JOIN systemRoles sr ON usr.roleId = sr.id 
WHERE u.email LIKE '%mohsin%' OR u.email LIKE '%qureshi%' OR u.name LIKE '%Mohsin%'
LIMIT 5;
command:
